name: EuiFilterButton

numFilters.description:
Pass the total number of filters available and it will
add a subdued notification badge showing the number

isToggle.description: Switches between toggle and regular button

isSelected.description:
Applies a visual state to the button.
Automatically applies `aria-pressed` when used with `isToggle={true}`.
Otherwise applies `aria-expanded` when used with `isToggle={false}` and
`iconType="chevronSingleDown"` as trigger button for e.g. a popover.

grow.description: Should the button grow to fill its container, best used for dropdown buttons

withNext.description: Remove border after button, good for opposite filters

badgeColor.description: Change color of the counter badge

color.description:
Any of the named color palette options.

Do not use the following colors for standalone buttons directly,
they exist to serve other components:
 - accent
 - warning

isDisabled.description: Controls the disabled behavior via the native `disabled` attribute.

hasAriaDisabled.description:
NOTE: Beta feature, may be changed or removed in the future

Changes the native `disabled` attribute to `aria-disabled` to preserve focusability.
This results in a semantically disabled button without the default browser handling of the disabled state.

Use e.g. when a disabled button should have a tooltip.

iconSide.description: Can only be one side `left` or `right`

isLoading.description: Force disables the button and changes the icon to a loading spinner

textProps.description:
Object of props passed to the `<span>` wrapping the content's text/children only (not icon)

This span wrapper can be removed by passing `textProps={false}`.

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

contentProps.description: Object of props passed to the `<span>` wrapping the button's content

example: <EuiFilterButton iconSide="right" color="text" badgeColor="accent" grow hasActiveFilters numFilters={5} iconType="chevronSingleDown" />
